compname v.20200515
(System) Get ComputerName value from System hive

Key path: SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\ComputerName\ComputerName
LastWrite: 2024-01-15 08:30:00Z

ComputerName        REG_SZ    WORKSTATION-01

Key path: SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\ComputerName\ActiveComputerName
LastWrite: 2024-01-15 08:30:00Z

ComputerName        REG_SZ    WORKSTATION-01
